title: Anti-Alien League

{{Quote|That is why I, Gorton Colu, have founded the Anti-Alien League. The time has come for action! We cannot sit idly by while aliens blight our glorious planet!|Gorton Colu|<ref name="kotor" />}}
The '''Anti-Alien League''' was a [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentrist]] group formed before<ref name="kotor" /> [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> Founded by [[Gorton Colu]], a resident<ref name="kotor" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="tea">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], the group lobbied for the [[Death/Legends|massacre]] of all [[Alien|non-Humans]], especially those like [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] or [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] without any Human characteristics, and "[[Alien/Legends|alien]] lovers" living on the planet.<ref name="kotor" />

[[File:Gorton_Colu1.jpg|thumb|right|175px|[[Gorton Colu]], founder of the Anti-Alien League]]
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC" /> Colu obtained permits from the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] government imposed on Taris after the planet was [[Capture of Taris|captured]] and spread his message in Taris's [[Upper City]], the section of Taris where the wealthy resided and where alien [[Species/Legends|species]] were normally prohibited. The amnesiac [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who had [[Attack on the Endar Spire|crashed]] on Taris, encountered Gorton Colu preaching his [[speciesism]]. Colu mentioned the Anti-Alien League while giving an anti-alien speech to Revan.<ref name="kotor" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Anti-Alien League is mentioned in [[BioWare]]'s [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. Colu is not involved in any essential parts of the game's plot, so whether or not Revan conversed with him is ambiguous. If Revan does engage the man, he can either agree completely with Colu's message or call him crazy. Revan later has two non-Humans join his party, the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Zaalbar]] and the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Mission Vao]], and should Revan talk to Colu while either of them is walking with him, Colu will chide Revan.
